revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{DEFAULTSORT:ここ}} [[Category:言語史]] [[Category:語彙論]] [[Category:用語]] [[ar:تصنيف:ألفاظ أثرية]] [[de:Kategorie:Archaismus]] [...'
revision.text:
{{DEFAULTSORT:ここ}} [[Category:言語史]] [[Category:語彙論]] [[Category:用語]]
[[ar:تصنيف:ألفاظ أثرية]] [[de:Kategorie:Archaismus]] [[en:Category:Archaic words and phrases]] [[fa:رده:کلمات و عبارات قدیمی]] [[ru:Категория:Архаизм]]

revision.comment: ボット: 言語間リンク 5 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[:d:Q7076509]] に転記
revision.text: {{DEFAULTSORT:ここ}} [[Category:言語史]] [[Category:語彙論]] [[Category:用語]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:ここ}} [[Category:言語史]] [[Category:語彙論]] [[Category:用語]]

revision.comment: −[[Category:語彙論]]; −[[Category:用語]]; +[[Category:日本語の語句]] ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)
[[Category:言語史]]を除去; [[Category:日本語の歴史]]を追加 ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:古語]] [[ar:Category:ألفاظ أثرية]] [[be_x_old:Category:Архаізмы]] [[commons:Category:Archaic words and phrases]] [[eo:Category:Arĥaikaj vortoj kaj esprimoj]] [[es:Category:Arcaísmos]] [[fa:Category:واژه‌ها و عبارت‌های قدیمی]] [[hi:Category:आर्ष शब्द और वाक्यांश]] [[id:Category:Kata dan frasa arkais]] [[ka:Category:არქაული სიტყვები და ფრაზები]] [[ko:Category:고졸기 어구]] [[mdf:Category:Архаизматне]] [[mk:Category:Архаизми]] [[uk:Category:Архаїзми]] [[ur:Category:متروک الفاظ اور جملے]] [[uz:Category:Arxaik soʻzlar va iboralar]] [[vi:Category:Từ ngữ cổ]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Tobe]].

revision.comment: Bot: log revisions ≥ 2025-05-13 with full text

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{Commonscat|Archaic words and phrases}} {{Cat more|Archaism}} {{Related category|Extinct languages}} {{Template:Wiktionary category 2|Archaic terms by language}}

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q7076509)
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q7076509)
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
